summary: Comprehensive testing of reworked Work Orders tab with multi-row attendance popup. All 13 requested features verified and working correctly. Backend APIs pass 100% (9/9 tests). Frontend UI verification complete.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data: cont_mason01 (Raju Masonry Works - 3 stages: Foundation Masonry=approved, Ground Floor Walls=pending/active, First Floor Walls=pending/upcoming), cont_elec01 (Selvam Electricals - stages with labour rates)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Work Orders tab multi-row attendance feature fully functional. Key verifications: (1) Multi-row attendance popup with Skilled/Semi-Skilled/Unskilled rows - PASS, (2) Each row has count, rate, and auto-calculated total - PASS, (3) Total daily cost auto-sums all rows - PASS, (4) Stage classification: Active=blue border, Completed=Closed badge+green, Upcoming=greyed+locked - PASS, (5) Upcoming stages show only name and expected date (no amount, cannot expand) - PASS, (6) Completed stages can be clicked to view details - PASS, (7) Active stages show full details: amount, dates, spend progress, labour rate badges - PASS, (8) Quick attendance button in header navigates to WO tab and opens popup - PASS, (9) Add Stage overlay creates new stage with name, amount, dates, labour rates - PASS, (10) Attendance log shows breakdown per record (Skilled:X, Semi-Skilled:Y, Unskilled:Z) - PASS, (11) Click attendance record shows detail popup with full breakdown - PASS, (12) Backend POST /api/labour-attendance saves multi-type entries and updates stage total_spend - PASS, (13) Backend POST /api/labour-work-orders/{wo_id}/stages adds new stage - PASS

multi_row_attendance_popup.details: Popup shows Skilled, Semi-Skilled, Unskilled rows with Count inputs, fixed Rate/Day, and auto-calculated Total per row

attendance_total_calculation.details: Total row sums all workers and costs correctly (e.g., 3+2+4=9 workers)

submit_attendance_creates_record.details: POST /api/labour-attendance creates record with entries array containing type, count, rate, total

stage_classification_active.details: First non-completed stage shows 'Active' badge with blue border, full details, and action buttons

stage_classification_upcoming.details: Stages after active are greyed out, show only name + expected date, have lock icon, cannot expand

stage_classification_completed.details: Approved stages show 'Closed' badge (green), can click to expand and view attendance history

active_stage_details.details: Shows: amount, dates, spend progress bar (26%), 'X days | Spent: ₹Y', labour rate badges (Skilled: ₹800/day, Semi-Skilled: ₹600/day, Unskilled: ₹400/day)

quick_attendance_button.details: Button in project header navigates to Work Orders, auto-selects contractor with active stage, opens attendance popup

add_stage_popup.details: Overlay with: Stage Name, Amount, Start/End Date pickers, Labour Rates (Skilled/Semi-Skilled/Unskilled inputs), Notes, Add Stage button

attendance_log_breakdown.details: Table shows Date, Breakdown (Skilled: 2, Semi-Skilled: 2, Unskilled: 2), Total workers, Cost columns

attendance_detail_popup.details: Click record shows popup with full breakdown: Type | Workers | Rate | Total for each labour type

backend_attendance_api.details: POST creates multi-type entries, updates stage.total_spend and stage.total_attendance_days

backend_add_stage_api.details: POST /api/labour-work-orders/{wo_id}/stages creates stage with labour_rates array, updates work order total_amount

screenshots_taken: 04_work_orders_tab.png - Contractor list with type badges and amounts
05_mason_stages.png - Raju Masonry 3 stages: Closed, Active, Upcoming
06_active_stage_expanded.png - Active stage with labour rate badges and attendance log
08_add_stage_popup.png - Add New Stage overlay with all fields
09_attendance_detail_popup.png - Detail popup with full type breakdown
12_final_quick_att.png - Quick attendance button opens popup automatically
